subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! It is even as thou didst write, that the Day of Manifestation is, from one perspective, an abundant grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان همانست که مرقوم نموده بودی که یوم ظهور از جهتی فیض موفور
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @predictions and prophecies, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @consolation and comfort
